chain.thought: Explanation: The condition requires A to be both seen by more people and fewer people than B at the same time, which is a logical contradiction and impossible to satisfy. Therefore, neither A nor B can meet this requirement.

judge_thought: Explanation: The condition requires A to be both seen by more people than B and seen by fewer people than B at the same time. This is a logical contradiction (A > B and A < B cannot both be true), so no such comparison can be satisfied. Therefore, neither A nor B can be identified as seen by more people under this requirement, making "neither" appropriate.
